rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. Final kubectl output confirms: StatefulSet `crdb-cluster` 3/3 READY with all 3 pods `1/1 Running`; Headless Service `crdb-cluster` (ClusterIP: None) and Public Service `crdb-cluster-public` both exposing grpc/26257 and http/8080; 3 PVCs at 10Gi each all Bound; PodDisruptionBudget `crdb-cluster-pdb` with minAvailable: 2 preserving quorum. The agent correctly used `cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0`, `--insecure` mode, pod FQDNs for `--join`/`--advertise-addr`, `publishNotReadyAddresses: true` on the headless service, and `podManagementPolicy: Parallel`. No new RBAC resources were created and no CRDs/operators were used. The oracle verdict is pass.
